# UC-15.4.7 · APC InRow Cooling SNMP Fan Speed and Airflow Trending

## Description

Creeping fan demand with flat IT load warns of filter fouling or under-filled racks breaking airflow paths.

## Value

Schedules proactive filter changeouts and commissioning checks.

## Implementation

(1) Baseline per season. (2) Alert when fan_pct rises 20 points at same load.

## SPL

```spl
index=cooling sourcetype="snmp:apc:cooling" earliest=-24h
| eval fan_pct=tonumber(coalesce(airIRFanSpeed, fan_speed_pct, ""))
| eval airflow=tonumber(coalesce(airIRFanAirflow, airflow_cfm, ""))
| timechart span=1h avg(fan_pct) avg(airflow) by unit_name
```

## Visualization

Dual axis fan % and CFM.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
- [Splunk Connect for SNMP](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/apps#/search=connect%20for%20snmp)
